title: Space Salvage
visualThesis: A cheerful deep-space salvage workshop: midnight indigo voids, cyan energy, warm orange utility lights, chunky rounded machinery, and instantly readable collectible silhouettes.
promptProfile: Premium polished casual mobile-game raster art, chunky rounded 3D illustration, friendly tactile materials, crisp silhouette, soft studio lighting, cohesive midnight-indigo/cyan/orange palette, no people, no characters, no hands, no text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no watermark.

prompts.backgroundPortrait: Portrait 9:16 background for a premium casual mobile merge game set inside a cheerful spaceship salvage workshop. Deep-space windows, midnight indigo metal walls, cyan energy conduits, warm orange utility lamps, distant stars, subtle depth and parallax layers. Keep the central and lower-middle play area calm and low-contrast for a game board overlay. No people, no characters, no items to collect, no interface, no text, no logos. Full-bleed opaque scene, polished chunky 3D illustration.
prompts.backgroundLandscape: Landscape 16:9 background for the exact same premium casual mobile merge game world: cheerful spaceship salvage workshop, deep-space windows, midnight indigo metal walls, cyan energy conduits, warm orange utility lamps and distant stars. Keep the central and lower-middle play area calm and low-contrast for a game board overlay. No people, no characters, no collectible items, no interface, no text, no logos. Full-bleed opaque scene, polished chunky 3D illustration.
prompts.generator: One isolated sci-fi salvage fabricator for a premium casual mobile merge game: a compact rounded recycling machine with a glowing cyan core, orange clamps and a friendly chunky silhouette, front three-quarter view. Entire object visible with generous margin. Flat pure chroma green #00FF00 background only, no floor, no shadow beyond the object, no people, no characters, no text, no symbols, no logos.
prompts.lockStage1: One isolated stage-one obstacle for a premium casual mobile merge game: a small magnetic cargo pod wrapped with loose orange hazard straps, visibly easy to open, rounded friendly sci-fi design, front three-quarter view. Entire object visible with generous margin. Flat pure chroma green #00FF00 background only, no floor, no people, no characters, no text, no letters, no numbers, no logos.
prompts.lockStage2: One isolated stage-two obstacle for a premium casual mobile merge game: a heavy sealed alien-tech vault tile with thick indigo armor, cyan energy seams and two large mechanical clamps, clearly tougher than stage one, square readable silhouette, front three-quarter view. Entire object visible with generous margin. Flat pure chroma green #00FF00 background only, no floor, no people, no characters, no text, no letters, no numbers, no logos.
prompts.chain1Sheet: A strict horizontal sprite sheet with exactly 7 isolated objects in seven equal columns, left to right showing a clearly monotonic sci-fi power-core progression: 1 loose energy bolt, 2 wired spark plug, 3 compact battery, 4 glowing plasma cell, 5 shielded reactor capsule, 6 advanced fusion core, 7 spectacular warp core. Same front three-quarter camera, centered one object per column, generous equal margins, nothing crosses a column boundary. Premium chunky casual-game 3D art, cyan/orange/indigo palette. Flat pure chroma green #00FF00 background across the entire sheet. No people, no characters, no text, no labels, no numbers, no logos.
